cloud_service: AcmeSign Pro - Cloud-based document management and e-signature platform
custom_fee_structure: Usage-based pricing: $0.10 per API call, billed monthly in arrears
use_limitations: Customer may not use the Cloud Service for any illegal purpose, to transmit malware, or to exceed the licensed number of users. Customer shall not reverse-engineer, sublicense, or resell the Cloud Service.
professional_services_billing: Invoices for professional services will be sent monthly in arrears based on hours worked at the agreed rate.
technical_support: Email and chat support during business hours, Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM ET
professional_services_description: Implementation, data migration, and user training services
professional_services_reference: See Statement of Work #1, dated March 15, 2026
support_request_process: Email support@techco.com or visit www.techco.com/helpdesk to submit a ticket
